business_ideas.idea: AI dropshipping: niche wedges combining AI models with marketing distribution.
AI companion app for underserved niche segments targeting specific demographics.
Voice automation agents for service businesses like restaurants, HVAC, dental offices.
AI e-commerce assistant managing listings, pricing, copy across platforms.
Personalized email autocomplete trained on user's writing voice.

predictions.text: Every small business will eventually need an AI agent like every business needs a website today.
Healthcare admin automation is fertile ground as billing and coding are slow and manual.
